meta.title: Logistics Services | AWSOverseas
meta.description: Explore AWSOverseas's complete range of international logistics services including Air Freight, Sea Freight, Import & Export, Customs Clearance, Warehousing, and Door-to-Door Cargo Solutions.

hero.title: Complete International Logistics Solutions Under One Roof
hero.subtitle: From air freight and sea freight to customs clearance and warehousing, AWSOverseas provides end-to-end logistics services that simplify global shipping for businesses and individuals.

overview.title: Comprehensive Freight & Logistics Services
overview.description: AWSOverseas delivers reliable, cost-effective, and technology-driven logistics solutions tailored to businesses of all sizes. Our experienced team manages every stage of the shipping journey, ensuring secure transportation, timely delivery, and complete customer satisfaction.

airFreight.title: Air Freight
airFreight.description: Fast and reliable international air cargo solutions for urgent and high-value shipments. We partner with leading airlines to ensure secure and timely deliveries worldwide.

seaFreight.title: Sea Freight
seaFreight.description: Affordable ocean freight solutions for commercial and bulk cargo with flexible Full Container Load (FCL) and Less than Container Load (LCL) options.

importServices.title: Import Services
importServices.description: Simplify international imports with expert logistics planning, customs documentation, cargo handling, and end-to-end shipment coordination.

exportServices.title: Export Services
exportServices.description: Expand your business globally with seamless export logistics, documentation support, customs processing, and reliable international transportation.

warehousing.title: Warehousing & Distribution
warehousing.description: Secure warehousing facilities with inventory management, cargo storage, packaging, consolidation, and distribution services.

customsClearance.title: Customs Clearance
customsClearance.description: Efficient customs clearance services handled by experienced professionals to ensure faster approvals and regulatory compliance.

cta.title: Ready to Ship Across the Globe?
cta.description: Whether you're importing, exporting, or managing international cargo, AWSOverseas is ready to provide reliable logistics solutions tailored to your business.
